title: Title
disclaimer_text: By using this service, you confirm that this video belongs to you or that you have the right to publish it.
write_a_short_summary_or_description: Write a short summary or description
you_must_be_logged_in_to_upload_videos: You must be logged in to upload videos
upload_desc: Upload a new video to NostrTube.
FAQ_Description: Frequently Asked Questions about NostrTube. Find answers to common questions and learn more about our platform.
Terms_Description: Read the Legal Notice for NostrTube, a decentralized video sharing platform built on the Nostr protocol. Understand your rights and responsibilities while using our service.
search_page_description: Search and discover videos on NostrTube.

combo.title: Age Rating
combo.helper: Define the appropriate audience for this content.

visibility.title: Privacy & Visibility
visibility.age_description: Adjusts content based on age group.

feedback.modal_description: Send suggestions, bug reports, thanks and support through a private NIP-17 message with an optional ZAP.
feedback.message_placeholder_default: Describe your suggestion, issue or appreciation. Include reproduction steps if this is a bug.

fields.title: Title
fields.title_placeholder: Ex: Improve video search by hashtag
fields.message_help: Your message will be published to the Nostr network and may be publicly visible.
fields.message_help_private: Your message will be sent as a private NIP-17 message to the configured recipient.
fields.include_technical_help: Includes current URL, shortened user agent, app version, timestamp and locale.
fields.zap_help: The ZAP will be attempted after the feedback is published.

auth_required.title: Login required to publish
auth_required.description: You can fill out the form now, but you must log in with your Nostr identity before sending.

privacy.pow_notice: We use a small proof of work to reduce spam. This may take a few seconds.
privacy.private_message_notice: Your feedback will be sent as a private NIP-17 message, but still avoid sharing passwords, private keys, tokens or sensitive data.
privacy.security_notice: Do not send passwords, private keys, tokens or sensitive data.

success.title: Feedback sent
success.description: Your feedback has been published to the Nostr network.
success.invoice_ready: Feedback sent. Open your Lightning wallet to complete the ZAP.
success.zap_failed_after_feedback: Feedback was sent successfully, but the ZAP could not be completed.
success.private_delivery_notice: Delivered as a private NIP-17 message.
success.invoice_description: A real Lightning invoice was generated. Open your wallet to complete the payment.

errors.unauthenticated: Log in with your Nostr identity before sending feedback.
errors.invalid_recipient: The configured feedback recipient is invalid.
errors.pow_cancelled: Sending was cancelled during POW calculation.
errors.pow_failed: The feedback POW could not be calculated.
errors.sign_failed: The Nostr event could not be signed.
errors.publish_timeout: Sending timed out before publication was confirmed on relays.
errors.publish_failed: The feedback could not be published to relays.
errors.relay_unavailable: No relay is available to publish the feedback.
errors.recipient_metadata_failed: Recipient metadata could not be loaded for ZAP.
errors.zap_unavailable: The recipient does not have a Lightning address configured for ZAP.
errors.zap_invoice_failed: The Lightning invoice for the ZAP could not be generated.
errors.zap_payment_failed: The feedback was sent, but the Lightning payment was not completed.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred while sending feedback.

feature-request.label: New feature
feature-request.description: A new idea that would add value to the product.
feature-request.placeholder: Describe the desired feature, why it would be useful and how you imagine it working.

bug-report.label: Bug report
bug-report.description: Something is not working as expected.
bug-report.placeholder: Describe the bug, what you expected to happen, what happened and the steps to reproduce it.

thanks.label: Thanks
thanks.description: A message of support or appreciation.
thanks.placeholder: Share what you liked, why it was useful and whether you want to support it with a ZAP.

ui-ux.label: UI/UX improvement
ui-ux.description: Adjustments to the visual or usage experience.
ui-ux.placeholder: Explain what part of the interface can improve and how it impacts the experience.

performance.label: Performance
performance.description: Slowness, freezing or excessive resource usage.
performance.placeholder: Describe where the application became slow, froze or used too many resources.

video-player.label: Video player
video-player.description: Problems or improvements in the player.
video-player.placeholder: Explain the player behavior, including loading, audio, captions or controls.

upload-blossom.label: Upload / Blossom
upload-blossom.placeholder: Describe the difficulty with upload, processing or Blossom usage.

search-discovery.label: Search and discovery
search-discovery.description: Search, filters, navigation and content discovery.
search-discovery.placeholder: Explain what is missing or what could be improved in search and content discovery.

feeds-recommendations.label: Feeds and recommendations
feeds-recommendations.placeholder: Describe how feeds or recommendations could become more useful.

login-nostr.label: Login / Nostr
login-nostr.placeholder: Explain the issue or desired improvement in the Nostr login flow.

moderation-content.label: Moderation / content
moderation-content.placeholder: Describe the need related to moderation or content display.

privacy-security.label: Privacy / security
privacy-security.placeholder: Explain the privacy or security concern and the context where it appears.

i18n.label: Translation / i18n
i18n.placeholder: Provide the language, the problematic text and the desired improvement.

documentation.label: Documentation
documentation.placeholder: Describe the question, documentation gap or what could be clearer.

other.label: Other
other.placeholder: Describe your suggestion, issue or appreciation. Include reproduction steps if this is a bug.
